mapper.select: SELECT MONTH(voucher_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(debit_amount) AS totalDebit, SUM(credit_amount) AS totalCredit, MAX(updated_time) AS lastUpdateTime FROM sys_voucher WHERE unit_id = #{unitId} AND YEAR(voucher_date) = #{year} GROUP BY MONTH(voucher_date) ORDER BY MONTH(voucher_date)

SELECT MAX(v.voucher_id) AS voucher_id, v.unit_id, v.voucher_no, v.voucher_date, MAX(v.summary) AS summary, SUM(v.debit_amount) AS debit_amount, SUM(v.credit_amount) AS credit_amount, MAX(v.creator) AS creator, MAX(v.auditor) AS auditor, MAX(v.bookkeeper) AS bookkeeper, MAX(v.cashier) AS cashier, MAX(v.status) AS status, MAX(v.created_time) AS created_time, MAX(v.updated_time) AS updated_time FROM sys_voucher v WHERE v.unit_id = #{unitId} AND YEAR(v.voucher_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(v.voucher_date) = #{month} GROUP BY v.voucher_no, v.voucher_date, v.unit_id ORDER BY v.voucher_date, v.voucher_no
